description: Robert Chen from Ottersec discusses decompiling Solana programs, focusing on a recent hack involving Loopscale that resulted in a $5 million loss. The presentation covers the challenges of analyzing closed-source programs on Solana and introduces a decompilation framework used to investigate the hack, including insights on how to reverse engineer BPF bytecode [t=6:64-335:01].
topic_summary: The talk addresses the complexities of decompiling Solana programs, the implications of closed-source software, and practical applications of reverse engineering tools in the context of a recent hack on the Loopscale lending market [t=6:64-335:01].
